name: unity-agent-workflows
description: Codex skill for safer Unity AI agent workflows, runtime-owner proof, and Unity game development automation.

interface.shortDescription: Safer AI workflows for Unity 2D projects
interface.longDescription: Use Teach first. Teach creates or refreshes UNITY_STRUCTURE.md for the current Unity 2D project, then agents use disciplined repo discovery, runtime-owner proof, project-derived routing, UI and scene safety, validation, and cleanup proof before editing.
defaultPrompt: Use $unity-agent-workflows to prove and fix a Unity runtime-visible bug.
